name: Mom's White Pound Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour and baking powder together once.
2. Add the butter to the sifted dry ingredients and mix thoroughly.
3. Gradually add sugar, creaming until light and fluffy.
4. Add egg whites one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Stir in vanilla extract and almond extract.
6. Pour batter into two greased, 9x5x3 inch loaf pans lined with heavy paper.
7. Bake first for 40 minutes at 275 degrees F (slow oven).
8. Increase heat to 325 degrees F (lighter oven) and bake for another 40 minutes.
Source: The Latest Cake Secrets, General Foods Corporation, New York, 1934, pp. 52-53.
